summary:
PROPHETIC WARNINGS ON DIGITAL CURRENCY AND SURVEILLANCE: Brandon recounts a prophetic vision concerning the rapid passage of cryptocurrency legislation and the eventual transition to a cashless society. He warns that these legislative actions, ostensibly focused on privacy and regulatory frameworks, are actually laying the groundwork for a mandatory digital currency system. By comparing this to the biblical Mark of the Beast, Brandon cautions that the government will gain the ability to freeze individual bank accounts at will. He emphasizes that the public is distracted by mainstream news while these critical financial transformations are occurring silently, framing the transition as a precursor to global surveillance and control.

END TIMES THEOLOGY AND THE REMNANT: Brandon reassures believers that they will not suffer the wrath of the Antichrist, asserting that God will protect and elevate the faithful before the darkest times arrive. Drawing on the parable of the ten virgins, he stresses the importance of spiritual preparedness and enthusiasm for the coming of Christ, contrasting the devoted remnant with those who remain lukewarm. He warns that half of the church may be left behind due to their complacency and entanglement with worldly distractions.

ECONOMIC VISIONS OF ARTIFICIAL PROSPERITY: Brandon shares vivid visions illustrating an illusion of economic stability. He describes seeing Donald Trump parading a pig wearing lipstick, which symbolizes an inflated, superficial economy propped up by tax breaks and artificial housing markets. He envisions transparent Monopoly houses floating without a solid foundation, representing a fragile real estate sector. Additionally, he recounts seeing a brainless scarecrow dancing on a landscape of golden corn, further signifying deceptive financial distractions. He also mentions seeing Elon Musk sitting atop a stressed, struggling Tesla while wearing an American Party hat, indicating short-lived political and corporate pressures.

REGIONAL MIGRATION AND GEOPOLITICAL PROPHECIES: Brandon describes a mass exodus of people fleeing the East Coast, particularly New York, due to oppressive leadership and impending terror. He foresees massive, protective stone walls being erected around Texas to manage this migration. He also touches upon the ongoing Epstein scandal, visualizing rats hiding from spotlights on a pirate ship, representing a massive blackmail network involving politicians and celebrities. Furthermore, Brandon recounts a vision of Trump combating foreign ownership of American farmland, specifically predicting legislative battles to prevent China from purchasing agricultural sectors in states like Kansas and Missouri.

TERRORISM AND TRIBULATION IN MAJOR CITIES: Brandon recalls teachings from David Wilkerson and shares a vision of coordinated terrorist attacks in New York City involving deliberate fires and smoke surrounding iconic landmarks. He links these impending catastrophes to the consequences of corrupt political leadership and warns of a resulting mass migration out of the city. He also notes that similar shakings will affect Boston and Miami, describing a darkening spiritual atmosphere as October approaches, complete with an urgency linked to the World Series baseball events.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND PROTECTION FOR POLITICAL LEADERS: Brandon calls for intense intercessory prayer for Donald Trump, his marriage to Melania, and his family's safety against dark, Luciferian attacks. He details visions of circulatory health threats targeting Trump's heart and a demonic fog attempting to envelop the White House. He parallels Trump's strategic decisions with those of Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu, viewing both as instrumental in advancing end-time events. Furthermore, Brandon shares an alarming vision suggesting a potential assassination plot against Donald Trump Jr., likening it to the Kennedy curse, and urges continuous prayer to prevent a tragic scenario involving the Trump family in mourning. He concludes by praying for Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett and Judge Torres, specifically asking for soft hearts and decisions that will release financial blessings and unkink the flow of digital wealth for the faithful.
rawData: [July 19, 2025]-[The Lord showed me an attempt on Don Jr’s life – we must pray]-[https://youtu.be/x89DNpfd8jI]-[Hey, good morning, family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me today. And Diana, we're so blessed to have you all come on here and pray with us today. We're going to go over some things that the Lord showed me yesterday in prayer. And boy, was that a time of prayer. There are so many prophetic words coming to pass so quickly, and the Lord is downloading new things to the point where last night, whenever it was over, I told Braden, I said, 'I was tired and I had to take a break.' I told him, I said, 'This is amazing what the Lord is showing us.' And so, I want to go over some of those things with y'all. But if you see what was said about the passing of the crypto today, two or three major crypto bills were passed today. And it was just like the Lord said, and even when He said, 'I'm warning you, it's about privacy.' And people go and people say, 'Brandon, you know, they're able to spy on us anyway.' No, I'm talking about how they're able to reach into your cookie jar and take your cookies. I'm talking about them being able to push the button on your crypto account and completely lock you up, without hardly any notice. Boop. 'Sorry, you don't have access to your funds.' What happened? No control. Setting up constitutional rights around crypto, but what it's doing is it's bringing forth the beast system where you will not buy, sell, or trade without the mark of the beast. Do most of you understand what I'm saying? You will not buy, sell, or trade without the mark of the beast. What is digital currency? What is crypto? It's all being set up for the end of the end, for the beast system. Revelation is unfolding right in front of your face, and many people do not see it. And I said, 'As we are distracted, watch this hand.' He said, 'Watch this hand. All this stuff's going on—the Epstein list, war, war, war. But what's happening over here with this hand?' And the Lord said, 'Pay attention to this. For in the night, in the middle of the night, they're making laws; they're doing these things.' Taylor Greene came on the show with the other guy that was part of Trump's people and said at night this stuff was done. I'm very confused about news, the Genius Act. I thought there was a deal made to make sure that included was going to be the central bank digital currency, that there'd be no possibility of a backdoor to get that. So where are we? Steve, let me explain something. In 1971, we went off of the gold standard. The Federal Reserve did that, and we went to a cash society. The value of the dollar has drastically gone down; the buying power is less than 10 cents now from where it was in the 1950s before we went off the gold reserve. What's happening today on July 17th, 2025, when no one is paying attention, no one's talking about it. Everyone is in blind rage about the Epstein files, and I don't blame them. However, right now, what is being voted on today in Congress is the entire setup, groundwork, and entire infrastructure being laid to move from cash to digital currency. And the number one thing that is not happening today is a ban on a central bank digital currency. This means the ability for the government to take control of your digital bank account where all your money is and turn it off. And this is why I'm so upset, and it's not being talked about. Steve, I was the only no vote on the rule last night, and Congress set a record last night, and no one's talking about that either. This was the longest vote held open for a rule in history, and it finally shut down sometime around midnight because there was a deal made, and the deal will not be honored. It was a deal that Speaker Johnson made, and he said that he would put a ban on central bank digital currency in the NDAA. But let me tell you something: that's going to get stripped out in the Senate, because what they told us all week long is the Senate does not have the votes to pass a ban on a central bank digital currency. So I want to lay this out straight for you all. You never thought in your lifetime that the government would shut you down, would close your churches, would close your schools, would close your businesses, and that happened only a few years ago. But what is happening today is the groundwork is being laid. It's all in the name of cryptocurrency and stablecoin, but it is the entire regulatory process to switch us from cash to a cashless society, to digital currency that can be controlled by the federal government. And there will be no ban on a central bank digital currency. There will be no way to protect your ability to fully control your digital currency in the future. And I'm voting no to this today. I don't know if there will be any other no votes on the Republican side, but I'm voting no to this because I'm a Christian, and I've read the Bible, and I believe what Revelation 13:17 says, and I just cannot vote for a future system that will do that. She was furious because it was such a majority vote for the crypto, because I told you, and she said it's them being able to reach in your cookie jar. It's them being able to push the button and stop things. Folks, if you don't do what they want you to do in the days ahead—which is get the mark of the beast, get into the beast system—they're going to be able to cut your finances off, and you won't be able to buy, sell, or trade. And that's what I'm trying to tell you. We're going eventually to a cashless society, just like the Bible told us. We'll have a mark on our forehead or in our hand, and that's how you buy, sell, or trade. Now, do I believe we're going to go through that as a body? No. We are not appointed under wrath. I will continue to say that: we are not appointed under wrath. God is not a wife-beater. And He's not up there saying, 'Well, you know what, Brandon? You have all power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions and nothing shall by any means hurt you, but you don't have any power over the Antichrist and the demonic forces of him. I'm taking that power and authority away.' So, just letting you know, the Antichrist is coming by and he's going to chop your head off. And all of this 'hide your kids, hide your wife, hide your relatives because the Antichrist, the boogeyman, is coming to get you'—that's not what He's doing. He's going to take us out before, and we're not going to have to hide our kids, hide our wife, hide our dogs, our cats, our cousins, and get all up in a fraidy-hole because the Antichrist and his boogeyman are coming to get you. And I'm telling you, the body of Christ is going to walk victorious in these last days. And He said to me He's not appointed us under wrath. He's talked to me. There is a remnant. Now, are you a part of it? That's what you have to ask yourself. Are you one of the virgins? He said there are ten virgins: there are five of them that don't have their lamps full, and five that were anticipating the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ, the bridegroom. And they were going, 'We're excited! Our lamps are full, and we're looking because His redemption is drawing nigh.' And every one of them was so excited, the five of them. But the others were like, 'Uh-oh, our lamps are empty, and we're lukewarm. We're not excited. We're riding the fence, we're in bed with the world, trying to be with the Lord. I have one foot in the world, one foot in the church.' And those are the ones I'm talking about. Many of you... and I believe half the church will be left. Half the church will be left. I believe with all my heart that a lot of them will be taken—the ones that are on fire—and the ones that are lukewarm and are not looking for His return, and your head's in the sand, you're in trouble. And I'm telling you, it goes by the parable of the virgins. And so, are you part of the remnant that has their lamps full of oil? Are you excited about the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ? Are you looking for him? He's standing underneath the chuppah. He's standing underneath that canopy, he said, right now, and he's waiting. And the Lord told me, he said, "Brandon, I'm waiting on you to bring in the harvest of souls and do what I've called you to do with all you've got, and I'm coming to get you." But I'm not coming back for a church that's not on fire, that's lukewarm, trying to have an escape mentality—all busted and disgusted. Oh no, "the sky is falling." The sky is not falling, Chicken Little. Jesus is coming, but he's coming back for a glorious church. And are you ready for him? And so, this is part of what the Lord had for you today. But I want you to think about some of the words that he gave us about crypto. A foundation was being laid. When I went to go see Billy Burke in February, and the Lord spoke to us and he said, "I'm laying a foundation right now behind closed doors." And this will come out in the days ahead. As you're driving down the road going to Cape Canaveral, Brandon, there's laws being set into motion. There's bills being written right now in the middle of the night, and it will happen. And he said, then he talked to me about the falling of the stars, falling of things, and being back like the Wild Wild West coming into play to a stable society. And he said, "Five pillars will come about out of this. Five major pillars." And President Trump announced those five pillars. And I saw others would link up beside them and become friends to those five pillars. And every single one of those things has happened like the Lord told you all it would. It's all being done. And then today, the 17th, a major, major three bills were pushed through. I don't know if they're all good. I don't know what was in those, but I'm telling you all, they're setting up the system. And in the days ahead, it'll be wire-to-wire transfers. You got to look at the functionality of each one of these cryptos and what these, because he told me certain cryptos overnight will double, they'll triple. And then he said, "I saw some of them go to $5 quickly, some of them go to $10," and he said some of the targets of where they wanted to have this one was 150 bucks. And I saw the men talking. He said 100. I saw the number 150, and I tried to be as, I can't, I'm not here to give financial advice, but because I'm not telling you which one it is. I'm not telling you. But I saw certain ones doing it. Now, you pray about it and see what the Lord tells you. But we pray for judges. We pray for these things because the Lord says as we see these basically settlements and things happening, the hose will become unkinked. The hose will become unkinked and there will be a waterfall coming in the fall. September will be a time to remember. He said great change is coming in September, and it will go into the fall, and in the fall, it's time to rest it all. It'll be a time of rest and celebration coming. Now, it will be different for everybody. I'm not saying everybody's going to have rest and peace and joy and whatever, you know what the Lord's showing me, because did you prepare yourself for that? Did you listen to the Holy Spirit when I refer to this woman that the Lord showed me, and I talked about before, that if you're not here taking heed to what the Holy Spirit's telling you to do, some folks don't, you miss out on the boat. Not everybody's going to get on the boat. You have to be hearing God for yourself of what the boat is for you, because the boat might be something totally different. But either way, we know the boat's in motion. And we know that Jesus Christ is coming and he's preparing a way for his bride to have enough finances to get this gospel out. This is the rocket fuel to the rocket. Are you listening to me, son? For this will be one of the greatest missed opportunities if you don't listen to me. This boat, once it sets sail, son... He told me I was doing the dishes. And he said, "If you miss this opportunity, you'll not have another opportunity like this ever again. For once it hits a certain number, it will never go back down to what it was again. This will be a point of no return. And from that time on, this will be the standard, like it was back at 40 cents, and this becomes a standard, and it doesn't go back very far. You may find about, you know, four, five, ten cents, maybe even thirty, but nothing to where it was, and it goes for milestones, and there'll be progression, and there's a pause, and progression, pause, progress, but then never goes back to where it was at the beginning. And the Lord told me, he said, "This would be one of the greatest missed opportunities many will ever see, for a new industrial revolution is upon you." Like it was when the internet first started. There was so much missed opportunity when the internet first started. People became billionaires back whenever they first started the internet. And this is a new industrial revolution, bigger, like with electricity. This is bigger than the internet. AI will change the world forever. What did the Lord show us yesterday? I saw fall come and I saw Black Friday, and it was highlighted to me, and the Lord told me, "inflated numbers, inflated numbers." And all of a sudden, I saw Donald Trump with orange-looking skin, with yellow around his mouth, yellow around his eyes, and he had yellow hair. He had a blue suit on, white shirt with a red tie like he always wears. And he was so excited. He had a sign in his hand, and it was in black letters. It said "TAXES." And it was all in bold font. It was all in capital letters: "TAXES", and there was an arrow pointing down with percentage rates on this sign. And he was so excited showing the American people this sign. And he, all of a sudden, started to walk a pig. And the pig had red lipstick on, blue blush, blue eye shadow, and a brown-looking braided collar that was being walked by President Trump. And President Trump was parading this pig all over the place, up and down the streets in this vision. He was so excited to parade this pig, but the pig was still a pig, even with the lipstick on and all the makeup. And I saw a white picket fence. I saw the American Dream as I saw houses that looked like Monopoly houses that were floating in the air up above him. And every single one of the houses was transparent. There was really no foundation to them. There was no foundation to the housing market. It wasn't on the ground; it was floating in the air, and it was transparent. As I was looking through it, it was very, it wasn't firm. I saw a green stock arrow that was going above the housing market that went like this, and it was going, you know, like it was moving up like a ticker that was moving up above the housing market as he's walking this pig around, leading it around with a rope. So, I saw a golden landscape in another vision of this, and to many people, it looked like corn on the cob. The way it was all perfectly these squares that were back-to-back all looked like pieces of kernels of corn, and there were hills of them, all on these hills. And I saw this corn on the cob, but it looked like corn on the cob—it was gold nuggets, looking like gold little bricks. And upon that was a scarecrow. And the scarecrow was dressed in solid black. He had straw coming out of his arms. I saw it. And he was jumping on the golden corn cobs. These corn kernels. And he was clicking his heels in the air like whoopee. And he was clicking his feet in the air. But when he did that, he fell forward, and his black hat fell off, and he had no brain. His head was hollow. It was full of straw, but there was nothing of substance in his hat. And it was a black hat. And I know it was a representation of something because the Lord was showing me, "Watch the scarecrow. There's a scarecrow upon this gold. There's a scarecrow upon all this." As I saw President Trump walking around with his pig, and as I saw President Trump doing this, the Lord showed me Elon Musk. And Elon Musk was sitting upon a Tesla. And there was great pressure upon Tesla. He was sitting on the roof of it, and he was a lot larger in this vision. And as he was riding on the Tesla, the wheels began to spark, and the rubber on the road from the pressure of the car and how heavy everything was started to crush it. The wheels started burning out, and it had no traction, and he was losing control in this car as he was sitting on the Tesla. He was sweating profusely, and he looked like he was about ready to have a nervous breakdown on this Tesla. And he was looking around, and I could see him, but on his hat, he had "American Party." The American Party. It was a black hat with white letters. He had a black shirt on. Kind of like his hat was now MAGA, not a MAGA hat. You know how it was a dark MAGA? It was "American Party" on his hat, and he was sitting on this Tesla, and the Lord said it would be short-lived. And I said, "Oh, his life." And the Lord said, "No, I'm not speaking of his life. I'm speaking of the party and Tesla." It was under great stress. And he was talking about the American party. This new party would be short-lived. It was under great stress, and he was perplexed about what he was going to do. I could see him.  So I saw New York, and I saw a mass migration of people leaving New York because of the decisions that are about to be made there. I saw people leaving the East Coast by the hundreds of thousands because of the oppression that's about to set in on the East Coast for some folks. And they were leaving all these areas, and they were leaving up north from Ohio and Pennsylvania and all that, and they were moving toward the south trying to leave those areas. And I saw, which I thought was interesting, massive stone walls in Texas on the borders on the east and on the west. They didn't want the people coming to Texas. They didn't want them coming from all these areas. But I saw they looked like granite. It was marbled. It was beautiful. These stone walls were protecting Texas, but the top of it where it was connected to Oklahoma didn't have one of those walls. But I saw walls being formed from the east and the west concerning Texas.  And the Lord showed me Gavin. And the Lord said, "I'm dealing with Gavin. I'm going to deal with Gavin." And the Lord spoke to me about Gavin. And then I saw Epstein. And I saw great corruption concerning the Epstein files. But the Lord spoke to me, and he said, "The reason they will not show you everything is because of blackmail. There's much blackmail when it comes to this." And when he said that to me, I saw Asian men, European men, women, and people that were being blackmailed by being on the list. "If you do, you do what we tell you to do. Politicians, you do what we tell you to do, or we'll expose you and embarrass you." I saw certain men, as I saw a bald-headed man who had a heavy belly, and he had a white shirt on with a tie and black slacks. And I heard the Lord say, "Dead men tell no tales." Which is referring to that pirate movie as well. We looked it up: "Dead men tell no tales." And I thought, that's interesting. I saw this white man with this bald head sweating profusely. And I thought, what is that all about? But he looked like an average businessman.  Then I saw a boat. As I heard "Dead Men Tell No Tales," I saw a pirate ship. And upon this pirate ship, there were rats all over the boat. And as a spotlight was shining down on this boat, it was moving around trying to expose the rats that were on the ship. And as it moved, the rats would scurry around trying to hide themselves from this mass of light that was being shined all around on the boat's deck. And I could see the boat, and there was a storm in the distance. It was completely dark outside. But these rats were running around on the deck of this boat as fast as they could, trying to escape the light that was being shined on the deck. And I could see there were three different lights, and the lights were moving around, and they looked like spotlights at a prison. And they were shining. They were moving, but they were looking for the rats. But the rats were hiding in the background. And I could see the rats, and it was related to the Epstein files. And the Lord said there's a great cover-up. There's great darkness that is being hidden concerning this, for it is blackmail. They will not show you everything, and it's on purpose. There's great darkness here, and it's on purpose.  Leverage. He used the word "leverage." There's great leverage here that they don't want to lose. If they lose the leverage, they lose the status quo. They cannot lose the leverage, for you will not see what's on these lists on purpose. Blackmail and leverage and losing the status quo, because the rats don't want to be exposed, and they want to use that to their advantage. It's the manipulation of governments. It's the manipulation of marriages. It's the manipulation of wealth. It's very dark, what the Lord showed me. You would be shocked at the men and women that are on this list. I've warned you about politicians that are very dark in America. There are politicians that are very dark. Celebrities. It's not just about politicians. It's about celebrities, people with influence and a lot of money, that have a lot of perversion, that have sexual issues. And the Lord showed me, "This is not you. You're looking at heads of state and politician brands. This is a lot bigger than that. This is more than what you realize." Hollywood celebrities. I'm talking major stars, major basketball players. You would be shocked and in awe at some of these people. And the Lord told me, "They don't want to lose the status quo. Now, if they reveal some of it, they'll never reveal all of it, just to appease the people, to get them to shut up because it's caused such a ruckus. How do we get them to deflate this thing and get them to be on our side again because we're losing control of the boat? How do we get them to say, 'Okay, I'm satisfied'? You exposed a couple of people, and they were sacrificial pawns." Well, you know, we can afford to lose them, but we cannot afford to lose this, and it's darker than what you realize.  And the Lord showed me. So, that was another thing the Lord showed us yesterday. I kept seeing another distraction coming. And the Lord showed me Trump again with his orange face and his yellow lips and stuff. And he kept saying, "China." I could hear him saying "China." And he was talking about how we're going to pass legislation with the House and the Senate to stop China from having land in America. No foreign power will own land and farmland in America. And I saw great big tractors, massive John Deere tractors, that were riding upon the land that had tilled the soil but refused to plant the soil. And I saw a manipulation of farmland. But I saw China written across Kansas. I saw it in Missouri. I saw China. And I saw a black star that was surrounded like a capital in an area. And it was like a landmark like that. But they were fighting them in legislation with the House and the Senate in the days ahead, taking away China's and other foreign countries' rights to own farmland and any other kind of agriculture or whatever in our country, saying, 'We're not going to have it,' and they had to forfeit their rights. And I don't know what happened with that, but I can assume it's going to make some people mad. But, you know, it is what it is. I saw it, and then I saw a wave. I have to take this back to when I prophesied—this is when I saw the housing market, and this was around January. I saw the housing market going, but I saw a wave, and this massive wave was at a breaking point. But it was a shallow wave because the colors were not deep blue; it was light, like this water, so I knew the water was shallow. But there were $100 bills and there was gold. I saw a dollar sign. I saw cryptocurrency. I saw all these different kinds of wealth inside of this wave. And the Lord said, 'It's time to ride the wave, for it will not last very long. You must ride this wave because the wave won't last very long and then it's over.' But there is a wave, and I saw it going into 2026. He said, 'This is the window; I'm giving you a window of opportunity.' Tax breaks, interest rates will go down eventually. You're going to see what Jerome Powell is asking for. I don't know if Jerome Powell will be removed or whatever, but eventually interest rates will be lowered. A great economic boom because of these things will be artificial. The Lord said, 'It's a pig with lipstick. It's a wave that will not last forever. Ride the wave and get all you can out of it.' And I saw the wave with $100 bills and all this money was in this wave, but the wave came down and it was done. It was a warning. It was a very strong warning telling us of where we are right now. It was a glimpse as we see these things. It was very cartoonish. It was interesting the way it all was because I told Braden, I said it kind of looked like Simpsons characters or some kind of cartoon, the way the Lord was painting all of it, and I was seeing it and it was something that I won't forget. And then when He talks to me in colors and things like that, I remember them forever. As I'm telling you this, I can tell you the details very clearly. The signs of the times—but as I was praying and I was interceding for these things, it was on the Father's heart to warn you. We have a window. And He's bringing this window for His people to fund the gospel for this last outpouring. But you're going to have to stay close to His heart because He said, 'As you see these foundations and these things pass so quickly, so unanimously—I don't know about the Senate, but I saw the House and it happened, and this lady was not happy about it because of what was being pushed, and nobody, like I said, in the still of the night.' What is happening so quickly as we're watching Epstein and war over here? There's something happening. It's called the beast system. And most people don't see that the beast system is coming into play, and everything, your rights and your freedoms for CBDCs and all these things, is all happening, and a new industrial revolution—all this, folks, is part of the beast system, and most people are looking at Epstein. We're looking at Ukraine. We're looking at Israel bomb Damascus, and all that's biblical. But this is really biblical, folks, because we've been doing this for hundreds of years—dollar-backed standard, gold standard, all these things. And now we're coming to a beast standard, and most people don't see it. Are we months away, weeks away, years away? I don't know. This is where I'm at with it. The Lord said to me—if you go back to the vision, was it about a month ago?—He said to me, 'They will push away the money because they'll be afraid to touch it because of the virus.' I saw a blue currency in Europe, which was the euro. And the Lord said they'll be—remember I said the virus will start from China and Europe first. I saw them scared to touch paper money again because the virus was transferring. You know, money's dirty. It's one of the dirtiest. It's worse than a toilet stool. Yeah, money is worse than a toilet stool because it's filthy. It's never washed. So, they scare everybody with this new virus that's coming. 'We don't want to touch the virus on the money. We don't want to touch that money. Don't touch no $100 bills.' Folks, money is bad. Well, what do you have to have? Got to have a digital currency. 'But how do we access that?' 'Well, you know, there's a chip. We can have a bracelet at first or your phone.' Remember I told you they're going to say it's your phone? You've got your phone here, and your phone will be used. Remember I told you all it would go by the phone, and it will start to go from your phone to something else? And eventually they're going to take it, and it will be in your hand or your forehead, and everybody's going to accept it and go, 'Well, it's just part of it. They're protecting us.' You know, you don't want that virus anyway; it killed a lot of folks. But you have to desensitize. As I told you, as people are in a pot, they'll be like in a pot and the water's rising and the temperature's rising, you don't even know you're being cooked. Because just like a frog in a pot, the more it becomes familiar with the water temperature, the more it doesn't realize it's getting ready to boil, and then it's eventually cooked alive. It's time for folks to realize how close we are to the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. I say all this to tell you I have such an urgency. I'm not here to scare you; I'm here to prepare you. I'm here to sound the alarm. I'm here to warn you in the middle of the midnight hour, like Paul Revere riding from city to city, telling you not 'the British are coming,' but 'Jesus is coming.' Are you prepared for the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ? Is your heart ready for what's about to happen? It's not time to get all afraid and say the sky is falling. No, it's not.
